enumDescriptions: Native Ollama API on port 11434 by default.
OpenAI-compatible API exposed by LM Studio, usually on port 1234.
llama.cpp server; supports OpenAI-compatible or native /completion mode.
Any local endpoint that implements OpenAI chat completions.

opengravity.url.description: Legacy fallback URL used only when provider-specific URL is not set.

opengravity.model.description: Model name/ID for generation. Leave empty to use whatever model is loaded (common for llama.cpp). For Ollama use e.g. qwen2.5-coder:7b. For llama.cpp the model name is usually ignored when only one model is loaded.

opengravity.systemPrompt.description: Custom global instructions appended to the agent's absolute system prompt

opengravity.temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Lower is more deterministic for coding.

opengravity.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for each chat turn.

opengravity.contextLength.description: Model context window for chat/tool use (Ollama num_ctx).

opengravity.agentMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-call steps the agent can take per request. Raise this freely — the only real limit is your model's context window. Complex multi-file tasks often need 20–40 steps.

opengravity.maxReadFileBytes.description: Maximum file bytes the read_file tool returns in one call

opengravity.enableTerminalTool.description: Allow the agent to run terminal commands in the workspace root

opengravity.terminalCommandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for run_terminal_command tool in milliseconds

opengravity.includeHiddenFilesInList.description: Include dotfiles in list_files tool output

opengravity.enableFetchTool.description: Allow the agent to fetch content from URLs (documentation, API specs, GitHub raw files, etc.). Fetched HTML is stripped to plain text automatically.

opengravity.fetchToolTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for fetch_url and web_search tool requests.

opengravity.enableWebSearch.description: Allow the agent to search the web for information, best practices, documentation, and context. Requires configuring a search provider below.

opengravity.webSearchProvider.description: Search provider for web_search tool. 'brave' uses the Brave Search API (free tier, requires API key). 'searxng' uses a self-hosted SearXNG instance (no key, fully private).

opengravity.braveSearchApiKey.description: Brave Search API key for web_search. Free tier includes 2,000 queries/month. Get a key at https://brave.com/search/api/

opengravity.searxngUrl.description: Base URL of your self-hosted SearXNG instance (used when webSearchProvider is 'searxng').

opengravity.enableNativeToolCalling.description: Enable native function-calling when the selected local provider/model supports it

opengravity.repeatPenalty.description: Repeat penalty to reduce loops/repetition (primarily Ollama).

opengravity.presencePenalty.description: Presence penalty for OpenAI-compatible backends that support it.

opengravity.frequencyPenalty.description: Frequency penalty for OpenAI-compatible backends that support it.

opengravity.seed.description: Seed for more reproducible generations. Set -1 to let backend choose randomness.

opengravity.autocompleteContextLength.description: Characters of prefix context sent for inline completion.

opengravity.autocompleteMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for inline completion.

opengravity.autocompleteDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay for inline completion requests in milliseconds.

opengravity.presetProfile.description: Named tuning preset. This is updated when you run OpenGravity: Apply Preset.

opengravity.llamacppUrl.description: llama.cpp server base URL. Change this to your remote server address if running llama.cpp on another machine (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080).

opengravity.llamacppApiMode.description: llama.cpp API mode. Use OpenAI-Compatible for /v1/chat/completions or Native for /completion.
enumDescriptions: Use chat endpoint style compatible with OpenAI clients.
Use llama.cpp native completion endpoint and prompt format.

opengravity.llamacppChatEndpoint.description: llama.cpp chat endpoint path used in OpenAI-compatible mode.

opengravity.llamacppCompletionEndpoint.description: llama.cpp completion endpoint path used in native mode.

opengravity.thinkingLevel.description: Reasoning effort level for thinking-capable models.

opengravity.chatMode.description: Chat behavior mode: execute changes, plan architecture, or review risks.
enumDescriptions: Generate direct implementation guidance and code.
Focus on planning and architecture before coding.
Focus on critique, bugs, and risk analysis.
